TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}
TEXT.source: ti Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan katua qa·∏çis (Ku…´a…´au village, p.228)

S.PHON: izua ti pu éa éu éa éujan a vavu…≠uvu…≠u≈ãan.
izua ti pu éa éu éa éujan a vavu…≠uvu…≠u≈ãan.
S.TRANSL: There was Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan Vavuluvulungan.

S.FORM: izua ti Tjukutjuku a Ka·∏çangiangian i qina…´an a mamaw.
S.PHON: izua ti cukucuku a ka…ña≈ãia≈ãian i qina éan a mamaw.
S.FORM: izua ti Tjukutjuku a Kadrangiangian i qinaljan a mamaw.
S.PHON: izua ti ¶uku ¶uku a ka…ña≈ãia≈ãian i qina éan a mamaw.
S.TRANSL: There was Tjukutjuku Ka·∏çangiangian in the same village.

S.FORM: izua kuku ni Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan a qa·∏çis.
S.PHON: izua kuku ni pu éa éu éa éujan a qa…ñis.
S.FORM: izua kuku ni Puljaljuljaljuyan a qadris.
S.PHON: izua kuku ni pu éa éu éa éujan a qa…ñis.
S.TRANSL: Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan had a pet hawk.

S.FORM: nu kisudju ti Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan a sema Ka·∏çangiangian, avanu qaqivuin azua qa·∏çis.
S.PHON: nu kisu…âu ti pu éa éu éa éujan a s…ôma ka…ña≈ãia≈ãian, avanu qaqivuin azua qa…ñis.
S.FORM: nu kisudju ti Puljaljuljaljuyan a sema Kadrangiangian, avanu qaqivuin azua qadris.
S.PHON: nu kisu…âu ti pu éa éu éa éujan a s…ôma ka…ña≈ãia≈ãian, avanu qaqivuin azua qa…ñis.
S.TRANSL: When Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan went courting to the Ka·∏çangiangian house, he called the hawk to go along.

S.PHON: manu izua quma icua …âa éa…≠u.
manu izua quma i ¶ua …âa éa…≠u.
S.TRANSL: On the way there was a field at Dja…´alu.

S.FORM: manu vaik tia Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan katua qa·∏çis.
S.PHON: manu vaik tia pu éa éu éa éujan katua qa…ñis.
S.FORM: manu vaik tia Puljaljuljaljuyan katua qadris.
S.PHON: manu vaik tia pu éa éu éa éujan katua qa…ñis.
S.TRANSL: Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan and the hawk went off.

S.FORM: manu rinaung nua qa…´a a se ‚±¢inasalas.
S.PHON: manu rinau≈ã nua qa éa a s…ô éinasa…≠as.
S.FORM: manu rinaung nua qalja a se Ljinasalas.
S.PHON: manu rinau≈ã nua qa éa a s…ô éinasa…≠as.
S.TRANSL: Enemies from ‚±¢inasalas lay in ambush.

S.FORM: manu kem…´ang a qa·∏çis tu izua qa…´a.
S.PHON: manu k…ôm éa≈ã a qa…ñis tu izua qa éa.
S.FORM: manu kemljang a qadris tu izua qalja.
S.PHON: manu k…ôm éa≈ã a qa…ñis tu izua qa éa.
S.TRANSL: The hawk knew there were enemies there.

S.PHON: "ari ¶ik…ô…≠i, pu éa éu éa éujan; imaza qa éa."
"ari ¶ik…ô…≠i, pu éa éu éa éujan; imaza qa éa."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúCome on, let‚Äôs go back, Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan; there are enemies here.‚Äù

S.PHON: "pumaja," aja ti pu éa éu éa éujan.
"pumaja," aja ti pu éa éu éa éujan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúNever mind,‚Äù said Pu…´a…´a…´u…´uyan.

S.FORM: manu djema…´un tua quma, sa kuangi nua qa…´a ti Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan; manu matsay.
S.PHON: manu …â…ôma éun tua quma, sa kua≈ãi nua qa éa ti pu éa éu éa éujan; manu ma ¶aj.
S.FORM: manu djemaljun tua quma, sa kuangi nua qalja ti Puljaljuljaljuyan; manu macay.
S.PHON: manu …â…ôma éun tua quma, sa kua≈ãi nua qa éa ti pu éa éu éa éujan; manu ma ¶aj.
S.TRANSL: They reached the field, and Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan was shot by the enemies, and died.

S.FORM: "'ai anga ti kaka i Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan," aya a kuku a qa·∏çis.
S.PHON: "'ai a≈ãa ti kaka i pu éa éu éa éujan," aja a kuku a qa…ñis.
S.FORM: "'ai anga ti kaka i Puljaljuljaljuyan," aya a kuku a qadris.
S.PHON: " îai a≈ãa ti kaka i pu éa éu éa éujan," aja a kuku a qa…ñis.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúOh poor brother Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan!‚Äù said the pet hawk.

S.PHON: "ku kudavaw ti kaka a pap…ôva éut"
"ku kudavaw ti kaka a pap…ôva éut"
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhat can I do to bring my brother back to life?‚Äù

S.PHON: manu m…ôva éut.
manu m…ôva éut.
S.TRANSL: Well he came back to life.

S.PHON: ma≈ãc…ôz a qijajaw.
ma≈ã ¶…ôz a qijajaw.
S.TRANSL: People came to the rescue.

S.PHON: "an…ôma nu qaqijav…ôn" aja ti pu éa éu éa éujan.
"an…ôma nu qaqijav…ôn" aja ti pu éa éu éa éujan.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWhat‚Äôs all the fuss about?‚Äù said Pu…´a…´u…´a…´uyan.

S.PHON: "ma ¶aj a≈ãa, aja m…ôn canusun."
"ma ¶aj a≈ãa, aja m…ôn ¶anusun."
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúWe thought you were dead.‚Äù

S.PHON: "ki izua za ma ¶aj î éa uqa éaj.
"ki izua za ma ¶aj î éa uqa éaj.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúDead indeed, a tough male like me!

S.PHON: ari sakamaja, saumaqi."
ari sakamaja, saumaqi."
S.TRANSL: Come on, let‚Äôs just go home.‚Äù

S.PHON: ma≈ãc…ôz i umaq.
ma≈ã ¶…ôz i umaq.
S.TRANSL: When he got home,

S.PHON: q…ômauqau≈ã a kina.
q…ômauqau≈ã a kina.
S.TRANSL: his mother was crying.

S.PHON: "maja q…ômau≈ã, kina; izuanan ak…ôn.
"maja q…ômau≈ã, kina; izuanan ak…ôn.
S.TRANSL: ‚ÄúDon‚Äôt cry, mother, I‚Äôm still alive.

S.PHON: makuda éa uqa éaj."
makuda éa uqa éaj."
S.TRANSL: It‚Äôs nothing to a male like me.‚Äù

S.PHON: amin a kai.
amin a kai.
S.TRANSL: That‚Äôs the end of the story.
